generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values both safety and fairness, I've noticed how expanded domestic security powers have actually helped protect communities like ours. While some worry about civil liberties, the real story is how these measures have deterred threats before they even reach our neighborhoods. Local leaders we trust are seeing the benefits firsthand. #CommunityFirst #SafetyMatters
